notes: Iteration-2: audit.ts now emits MATRIX_COMPLETE / HARD_OUT_DETECTED / ESCAPE_HATCH_USED INFO findings + triggers/axis в shape + JSONL escape log. Expected counts updated.

evals.name: polymorphic-fr-complete-positive
evals.prompt: Run variant-matrix audit on polymorphic-fr-complete fixture. Expect MATRIX_COMPLETE INFO finding (positive signal, doesn't block).

evals.name: polymorphic-fr-no-matrix-gap-detected
evals.prompt: Run variant-matrix audit on polymorphic-fr-no-matrix fixture. Expect 1 WARNING — AC_DECISION_TABLE_MISSING с triggers + axis populated.

evals.name: polymorphic-fr-hard-out-h1-regression
evals.prompt: Run variant-matrix audit on polymorphic-fr-hard-out fixture (single-variant 'только'). Expect HARD_OUT_DETECTED INFO finding (visibility) — NOT WARNING (H1 mitigation).

evals.name: polymorphic-fr-ru-mixed-cross-language
evals.prompt: Run variant-matrix audit on polymorphic-fr-ru-mixed fixture (RU 'переиспользуем'). Expect 1 WARNING с RU phrases в triggers array.

evals.name: escape-hatch-short-reason-info
evals.prompt: Run variant-matrix audit on escape-hatch-short-reason fixture (reason='ok' 2 chars). Expect WARNING_REASON_TOO_SHORT INFO + AC_DECISION_TABLE_MISSING WARNING (short reason не bypass-ит). JSONL log entry должен быть appended.

evals.name: escape-hatch-boundary-8-chars
evals.prompt: Run variant-matrix audit on escape-hatch-boundary-8 fixture (reason='12345678' exactly 8 chars). Expect ESCAPE_HATCH_USED INFO (valid escape, bypass downstream). JSONL log entry appended.
